# Greenville Crawl Space Pros

> Greenville Crawl Space Pros connects homeowners in Greenville, SC and Upstate South Carolina with licensed crawl space encapsulation, vapor barrier, repair, dehumidifier, mold treatment, and floor joist specialists. Service area: Greenville County, SC and surrounding Upstate South Carolina counties.

This is a local crawl space services referral and education site for Greenville County and the Upstate SC region. Pages include pricing ranges, FAQs, service descriptions, and city-specific crawl space information.

## Contact

- Phone: (864) 387-3270
- Email: info@crawlspacegreenville.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- [Request a free estimate](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/contact): Contact form and phone for Greenville, SC homeowners

## Services

- [Crawl Space Encapsulation](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/services/crawl-space-encapsulation): Full seal with 20-mil vapor barrier, vent sealing, wall coverage, and dehumidifier ($5,000–$9,000 in Greenville)
- [Vapor Barrier Installation](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/services/vapor-barrier): Professional 20-mil ground and wall liner ($1,500–$3,500)
- [Crawl Space Repair](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/services/crawl-space-repair): Joist sistering, pier repair, mold-damaged wood, and drainage correction
- [Dehumidifier Installation](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/services/dehumidifier-installation): Commercial crawl-space-rated units sized for 45–55% RH ($1,200–$2,500)
- [Mold in Crawl Space](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/services/mold-in-crawl-space): Professional mold treatment before encapsulation ($500–$2,500)
- [Floor Joist Repair](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/services/floor-joist-repair): Sistering and replacement for moisture-damaged joists causing soft or sagging floors

- [Home](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/): Greenville crawl space encapsulation overview, symptoms, process, and FAQs

- [What Is Encapsulation](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/what-is-encapsulation): Explains full encapsulation systems and why they matter in South Carolina humidity
- [Encapsulation vs Vapor Barrier](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/encapsulation-vs-vapor-barrier): Comparison guide for humid-climate crawl spaces in Upstate SC
- [FAQ](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/faq): Common crawl space questions on cost, mold, humidity, process, and repairs
- [Areas Served Hub](https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/areas-served): All Upstate SC cities and counties covered

## Quick Facts

- Full encapsulation in Greenville, SC typically costs $5,000–$9,000 including dehumidifier
- Encapsulation projects usually take 2–4 days for a standard home
- Target crawl space humidity after encapsulation: 45–55% relative humidity
- Open-vent crawl spaces underperform sealed systems in humid climates like Upstate SC
